---
title: "Fundamentals of Business Finance"
subtitle: "FINC 4943"
author: "William McCumber"
---

# Welcome

This textbook introduces you to fundamental concepts and equations necessary to understand business finance at a graduate level.

## Course Overview

This course covers five key modules in financial theory and analysis, providing both theoretical foundations and practical applications.

## How to Use This Textbook

Each module contains:

-   Core concepts and theory
-   Practical examples in Excel
-   Applications to real-world financial problems

## Modules

The textbook is organized into five modules, each building on previous concepts to develop your financial modeling skills.
